mapper.select:
SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY SAL_MONTH DESC) RNUM, S.* FROM ( SELECT SAL_ID, EMP_ID, SAL_MONTH, SAL_BASE_PAY, SAL_OT_PAY, SAL_TRIP_PAY, SAL_DEDUCTION_TOTAL, SAL_NET_PAY, SAL_STTS, SAL_CREATED_DT FROM SALARY_MASTER WHERE EMP_ID = #{empId}
) S ) T WHERE T.RNUM BETWEEN (#{currentPage} * 10 - 9) AND (#{currentPage} * 10)

SELECT S.SAL_ID, S.EMP_ID, S.SAL_MONTH, S.SAL_BASE_PAY, S.SAL_OT_PAY, S.SAL_TRIP_PAY, S.SAL_DEDUCTION_TOTAL, S.SAL_NET_PAY, E.EMP_NM, E.EMP_JBGD AS "empJbgd", D.DEPT_NM FROM SALARY_MASTER S JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON S.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD WHERE S.SAL_ID = #{salId} AND S.EMP_ID = #{empId}

SELECT E.EMP_ID AS "empId", E.EMP_NM AS "empNm", E.EMP_JBGD AS "empJbgd", D.DEPT_NM AS "deptNm", #{searchMonth} AS "salMonth",
NVL(S.SAL_BASE_PAY, NVL(SB.BASE_MIN, 0)) AS "salBasePay",
NVL(S.SAL_OT_PAY, NVL(OT.TOTAL_OT_HOURS, 0) * 15000) AS "salOtPay",
NVL(S.SAL_TRIP_PAY, NVL(BT.TOTAL_TRIP_DAYS, 0) * 50000) AS "salTripPay",
NVL(S.SAL_DEDUCTION_TOTAL, (NVL(S.SAL_BASE_PAY, NVL(SB.BASE_MIN, 0)) + NVL(S.SAL_OT_PAY, NVL(OT.TOTAL_OT_HOURS, 0) * 15000) + NVL(S.SAL_TRIP_PAY, NVL(BT.TOTAL_TRIP_DAYS, 0) * 50000) ) * 0.105 ) AS "salDeductionTotal",
NVL(S.SAL_NET_PAY, (NVL(S.SAL_BASE_PAY, NVL(SB.BASE_MIN, 0)) + NVL(S.SAL_OT_PAY, NVL(OT.TOTAL_OT_HOURS, 0) * 15000) + NVL(S.SAL_TRIP_PAY, NVL(BT.TOTAL_TRIP_DAYS, 0) * 50000) ) * (1 - 0.105) ) AS "salNetPay",
NVL(S.SAL_STTS, '미지급') AS "salStts"
FROM EMPLOYEE E LEFT OUTER JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD LEFT OUTER JOIN SALARY_BASE SB ON TRIM(E.EMP_JBGD_CD) = TRIM(SB.EMP_JBGD_CODE) LEFT OUTER JOIN SALARY_MASTER S ON E.EMP_ID = S.EMP_ID AND S.SAL_MONTH = #{searchMonth} LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT A.EMP_ID, SUM(GREATEST(0, ROUND((A.ATT_CHECK_OUT - TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(A.ATT_WORK_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' 18:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')) * 24, 1))) AS TOTAL_OT_HOURS FROM ATTENDANCE A JOIN APRV_EXCS_WORK_DOC D ON A.EMP_ID = D.EMP_ID AND TO_CHAR(A.ATT_WORK_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_CHAR(D.EXCS_WORK_DOC_END, 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHERE D.EXCS_WORK_STTS = '결재완료' AND A.ATT_CHECK_OUT IS NOT NULL AND TO_CHAR(A.ATT_WORK_DT, 'YYYY-MM') = #{searchMonth} GROUP BY A.EMP_ID ) OT ON E.EMP_ID = OT.EMP_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT EMP_ID, SUM(BZTRP_TOTAL_DAYS) AS TOTAL_TRIP_DAYS FROM APRV_BZTRP_DOC WHERE BZTRP_STTS = '결재완료' AND TO_CHAR(BZTRP_START, 'YYYY-MM') = #{searchMonth} GROUP BY EMP_ID ) BT ON E.EMP_ID = BT.EMP_ID WHERE E.EMP_STTS = 'Y' ORDER BY E.EMP_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SALARY_MASTER ( EMP_ID, SAL_MONTH, SAL_BASE_PAY, SAL_OT_PAY, SAL_TRIP_PAY, SAL_DEDUCTION_TOTAL, SAL_NET_PAY, SAL_STTS, SAL_CREATED_DT, SAL_UPDATE_DT ) VALUES ( #{empId}, #{salMonth}, #{salBasePay}, #{salOtPay}, #{salTripPay}, #{salDeductionTotal}, #{salNetPay}, 'SENT', SYSDATE, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT D.DEPT_NM AS "team", ROUND(AVG(S.SAL_NET_PAY), 0) AS "value", #{searchMonth} AS "thisMonth" FROM SALARY_MASTER S JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON S.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID JOIN DEPARTMENT D ON E.DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD WHERE S.SAL_MONTH = #{searchMonth} AND E.EMP_ID NOT IN (12, 26030012) GROUP BY D.DEPT_NM ORDER BY D.DEPT_NM ASC

SELECT E.EMP_JBGD AS "team", ROUND(AVG(S.SAL_NET_PAY), 0) AS "value" FROM SALARY_MASTER S JOIN EMPLOYEE E ON S.EMP_ID = E.EMP_ID WHERE S.SAL_MONTH = #{searchMonth} AND E.EMP_ID NOT IN ('12', '26030012') GROUP BY E.EMP_JBGD ORDER BY "value" DESC
